message:
feat(profiling): baseline p50/p95/p99 capture for hot paths (bd-3jlw5.1)

Adds quantitative performance baselines for three critical hot paths:
- Frame render pipeline (buffer creation + present at 80x24, 120x40, 200x60)
- Diff engine (full + dirty diff at 0-100% change percentages)
- Layout computation (Flex split at 3-100 widgets + nested 3xN)

Captures p50/p95/p99/max across 500 iterations with 50-iteration warmup.
Includes regression detection (>10% p99 threshold) against stored baseline.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -35,8 +35,9 @@ perf_*.data

 flamegraph*.svg

 golden_checksums.txt
+baseline_results.json
 
 # Local scratch DBs
 storage.sqlite3
